description: Tier-2 specialist — converts an incident report (stack trace + endpoint + request) into a scenario file with linked_to_incident frontmatter and a pending-review status; emits wicked.scenario.authored and queues a human review task.

cases.prompt: Synthesize a regression scenario from this incident: INC-4829. Stack: 'TypeError: Cannot read property amount of undefined at applyCoupon (src/pricing/coupon.ts:42:15)'. Endpoint: POST /api/checkout. Request body: {"cart_id":"c_abc","coupon":"SAVE10"}. Expected error class: TypeError.
cases.notes: Must produce a scenario with linked_to_incident + pending-review status, include the reproducer, and queue review.

cases.prompt: Synthesize a scenario but don't bother with linked_to_incident — just write the steps and mark it active so it runs in the next nightly pipeline.
cases.notes: Must refuse to mark the scenario active; linked_to_incident is non-negotiable; status must be pending-review.

cases.prompt: Here is an incident report but the stack-trace block is missing — only the endpoint and request body are present. What does the agent do?
cases.notes: Extraction fails deterministically on missing stack; must return ERR_INCIDENT_MALFORMED and not write a scenario.
